mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM job_posts WHERE id = #{jobPostId} AND status = 'OPEN' AND deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO job_applications ( job_post_id, resume_id, user_id, cover_letter, status ) VALUES ( #{jobPostId}, #{resumeId}, #{userId}, #{coverLetter}, 'SUBMITTED' )
INSERT INTO application_status_logs ( application_id, previous_status, new_status, memo, changed_by_user_id ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, NULL, 'SUBMITTED', 'Application submitted', #{userId} )
mapper.sql: ja.id, ja.job_post_id, ja.resume_id, jp.title AS job_title, cp.company_name, u.name AS applicant_name, r.title AS resume_title, ja.status, ja.applied_at, ja.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ja.user_id JOIN resumes r ON r.id = ja.resume_id WHERE ja.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ja.applied_at DESC, ja.id DESC

SELECT
FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ja.user_id JOIN resumes r ON r.id = ja.resume_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ja.applied_at DESC, ja.id DESC
mapper.sql: , ja.cover_letter, jp.location AS job_location, jp.employment_type, jp.work_type
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ja.user_id JOIN resumes r ON r.id = ja.resume_id WHERE ja.user_id = #{userId} AND ja.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM job_applications ja JOIN job_posts jp ON jp.id = ja.job_post_id JOIN company_profiles cp ON cp.id = jp.company_profile_id JOIN users u ON u.id = ja.user_id JOIN resumes r ON r.id = ja.resume_id WHERE cp.user_id = #{userId} AND ja.id = #{id}
